top.title: Optimal Adaptive Market Making: A Theoretical Framework for High-Yield Liquidity Provision in Perpetual Futures Markets
top.summary: arXiv:2607.11888v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We develop a rigorous theoretical framework for optimal market making in perpetual futures markets with zero maker fees. We model the market maker's problem as a stochastic optimal control problem on a filtered probability space,…

topIndia.title: 'Like my lover': Chinese users bid farewell to AI companions
topIndia.summary: China implemented new rules on Wednesday to limit emotional reliance on AI companions. Major AI providers suspended custom agent and companion features before the deadline. These regulations target AI tools with human-like personalities and communication styles. That sparked a…
